nodes.context: Albanian American street gang operating in the Bronx and Staten Island, involved in gang violence, robbery, extortion.
Albanian organized crime group based in New York, involved in extortion, gambling, and loan sharking.
Transnational street gang originating in Los Angeles, active in the US and Central America, involved in drug trafficking, murder, extortion.

edges.context: Albanian Boys worked as subcontractors for the Rudaj Organization, engaging in extortion, intimidation, and debt collection.
Albanian Boys and MS-13 were rivals, as indicated in the infobox.
